query:
ALTER TABLE personas 
ADD COLUMN headshotUrl TEXT,
ADD COLUMN bio TEXT,
ADD COLUMN brokerage VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN licenseNumber VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN serviceAreas TEXT;
